summary: Tested Analytics Dashboard, DocuSign OAuth integration, and Lease Assignment Payment features. All 35 backend tests pass, all 13 frontend E2E tests pass. Fixed 2 bugs during testing: 1) POST /api/lease-assignments was returning MongoDB ObjectId causing serialization error, 2) Lease assignment payment metadata was failing when owner_id was null.
seed_data_creation: Created test lease assignments for payment testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics Dashboard, DocuSign OAuth integration, and Lease Assignment Payment features are fully working. Backend APIs: GET /api/analytics/overview, /api/analytics/activity, /api/analytics/revenue, /api/analytics/listings-performance, GET /api/docusign/status, /api/docusign/auth-url, GET/POST /api/lease-assignments, POST /api/lease-assignments/{id}/payment all verified. Frontend pages at /analytics, /esign, /lease-assignments render correctly with proper data-testid attributes.

bugs_fixed.issue: POST /api/lease-assignments endpoint was returning MongoDB _id field causing JSON serialization error
bugs_fixed.fix: Added assignment.pop('_id', None) before returning the response

bugs_fixed.issue: Lease assignment payment metadata.seller_id was None causing Pydantic validation error

Analytics_Overview_API.notes: Returns user, listings, transactions, contractors, documents stats

Analytics_Listings_Performance_API.notes: Returns price distribution, property types, avg prices by city

DocuSign_Status_API.notes: Returns connection status and integration key status

Lease_Assignments_CRUD.notes: GET list, POST create, GET single all working

Lease_Assignment_Payment.notes: Creates Stripe checkout session for assignment fee

Analytics_Dashboard_UI.notes: Shows 5 stat cards, refresh button, user/listing stats

ESign_DocuSign_Card.notes: Shows DocuSign integration card with Connect button

Lease_Assignments_Page.notes: Hero section, search input, create button visible
